case_title: DUNHAM BARBARA VS RUSSELL ISABELLE DBA I & Q

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL ISABELLE DBA I & Q AS PER MUTUAL RELEASE OF 7/14/94 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RUSSELL ISABELLE DBA I & Q
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JUL-18-1994, GRANTED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DUNHAM BARBARA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RUSSELL ISABELLE DBA I & Q $2,837.50 PRINCIPAL, $49.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,887.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
